meaning: n.[鐢熷寲]娴峰甫澶氱硸(鍖诲涓婄敤浣滄姉鍑濆墏)
examples: The ProPO was significantly activated by laminarin present in the plasma due to a much higher PO activity than that when the laminarin or the plasma was tested alone.
Objectives to sulfate the laminarin, then analyze the structure of polysaccharide sulfate, so as to make a foundation for the further research about its biological activity.
The cytoplasm and intercellular fluid can be extracted from enzyme hydrolyzed cellulosic material and pectin, then the laminarin can be obtained via separation and purification.
